     [38;2;80;200;80m[48;2;2;40;0m 89 +[38;2;248;248;242m                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             [39m[49m
     [2m[38;2;248;248;242m 90[0m [38;2;248;248;242m [39m    [38;2;248;248;242mpassword[39m [38;2;248;248;242m=[39m [38;2;248;248;242mdot_env.get([38;2;230;219;116m"CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD"[38;2;248;248;242m,[39m
     [2m[38;2;248;248;242m 91[0m [38;2;248;248;242m [39m                           [38;2;248;248;242mdot_env.get([38;2;230;219;116m"TELEMETRY_DATABASE_PASSWORD"[38;2;248;248;242m,
[39m     [2m[38;2;248;248;242m 92[0m [38;2;248;248;242m [39m                                       [38;2;248;248;242mdot_env.get([38;2;230;219;116m"TELEMETRY_DATABASES_US_PASSWORD"[38;2;248;248;242m,[39m [38;2;230;219;116m"OTEL"[38;2;248;248;242m)))[39m

[38;5;231m⏺[39m Now let me verify all three repos again:

[38;5;114m⏺[39m [1mBash[0m(cd /Users/yuvalhayke/code/morebrizzai && python3 ~/.claude/skills/access-local-db/scripts/ch-query.py "SELECT currentDatabase()" 2>&1)
[38;5;246m  ⎿  [39motel_more
[38;5;246m  ⎿  Shell cwd was reset to /Users/yuvalhayke/code/anotherbrizzai[39m

[38;5;114m⏺[39m [1mBash[0m(cd /Users/yuvalhayke/code/brizzai && python3 ~/.claude/skills/access-local-db/scripts/ch-query.py "SELECT currentDatabase()" 2>&1)
[38;5;246m  ⎿  [39motel
[38;5;246m  ⎿  Shell cwd was reset to /Users/yuvalhayke/code/anotherbrizzai[39m

[38;5;114m⏺[39m [1mBash[0m(python3 ~/.claude/skills/access-local-db/scripts/ch-query.py "SELECT currentDatabase()" 2>&1)
[38;5;246m  ⎿  [39motel

[38;5;231m⏺[39m All correct now:

  ┌────────────────┬───────────────┐
  │      Repo      │ ClickHouse DB │
  ├────────────────┼───────────────┤
  │ [38;5;153mmorebrizzai[39m    │ [38;5;153motel_more[39m     │
  ├────────────────┼───────────────┤
  │ [38;5;153mbrizzai[39m        │ [38;5;153motel[39m          │
  ├────────────────┼───────────────┤
  │ [38;5;153manotherbrizzai[39m │ [38;5;153motel[39m          │
  └────────────────┴───────────────┘

  The issue was that [38;5;153mmorebrizzai[39m overrides the DB name via [38;5;153m.env[39m ([38;5;153mTELEMETRY_DATABASES_US_DATABASE=otel_more[39m) while [38;5;153mconfig.yaml[39m has the base [38;5;153motel[39m. Fixed by giving [38;5;153m.env[39m values priority over [38;5;153mconfig.yaml[39m — which matches how the backend actually resolves config at runtime.

[38;5;246m✻[39m [38;5;246mCrunched for 1m 18s[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mso we good now?[39m
[49m
[38;5;231m⏺[39m Yes, all set. The skill works across all three repos with correct credential and database detection. You can trigger it by asking things like "check the database" or "query locally" in any repo.

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231m/c[39m
[49m
[38;5;114m⏺[39m [1mAgent[0m(Commit and push changes) [38;5;246mHaiku 4.5[39m
[38;5;246m  ⎿  [39mDone (1 tool use · 43.0k tokens · 6s)
[38;5;246m  (ctrl+o to expand)[39m

[38;5;231m⏺[39m Nothing to commit — the working tree is clean. The skill files are in [38;5;153m~/.claude/skills/[39m which is outside the repo.

[39m  [36m󰧑 Opus 4.6 (1M context)[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [32m░░░░░░░░░░[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [32m9%[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [35m󰍛 90.0k/1000k[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [33m yuval/brz-934-agent-feature-brainstorm-poc[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [1m[37m  anotherbrizzai[0m                                                                                                                                                                                    [38;5;114m  (_/  \_)
